form.author: Olivier Dagenais
form.video: Performed by Master John Laroda © Pro-Style Martial Arts

step.name: Open
step.line: Stand toward N
Slight bend in knees, raise bo with right hand
Left knife-hand strike, toward W, turn palm up, dynamic reach for bo near right armpit

step.name: Ready
step.line: Unwind hands as you turn toward E in ready stance

step.name: Punch
step.line: Look toward N, raise bo to shoulder height
As you move into a right front stance toward N, punch right

step.name: First kiai
step.line: Still in front stance: up, down, right, left
Bring bo backward and lift front foot
Thrust and bring down front foot, kiai

step.name: First uppercut
step.line: Still in right front stance, reverse strike, strike
As you bring the back foot up halfway, row backwards on the right
Move the right foot to a left hook stance, finishing the bo with an uppercut

step.name: Second kiai
step.line: Unwind by pivoting on the feet to turn facing S while performing a reverse strike
Bring bo on right shoulder and punch while moving to right front stance, kiai

step.name: First press
step.line: Bring left foot to right while pivoting to face E and raising left arm to hold bo to the right of the body
Dynamically move to left front stance, raising left arm as in a face block and right hand keeps bo mostly vertical, further out at the bottom

step.name: Second press
step.line: Bring right foot to left (still facing E) and raising left arm to hold bo to the left of the body
Dynamically move to right front stance facing S, raising left arm as in a face block and right hand keeps bo mostly vertical, further out at the bottom
Rotate bo counter-clockwise 360 degrees, ending with a sweeping reverse strike
Bring up back foot halfway while rowing backwards on the right
Move right foot into a left hook stance, finishing the bo with an uppercut
